    Description
    Microservice<Member>
    Base class for KivaKit microservices.
    MicroserviceCluster<Member>
    Manages members of a cluster by storing MicroserviceClusterMember objects with associated user data in an ephemeral, sequential Apache Zookeeper store.
    MicroserviceClusterMember<Data>
    Represents a member of a MicroserviceCluster with associated user data.
